sections.short-biography: Noted the talent of Zhang Ji, fell out with Hu Zhen and killed. Hu Zhen soon died, blaming Yin’s spirit.

full_text:
You Yin
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
You Yinwas born in Zuopingyi. Noted the talent of Zhang Ji, fell out with Hu Zhen and killed. Hu Zhen soon died, blaming Yin’s spirit. You Yin was affiliated with the Han Dynasty.
